page: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadsv7 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with a 236 GB local disk and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage options. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its balanced compute-to-memory ratio and dedicated vCPU allocation, this server is designed for general-purpose workloads. The inclusion of a 236 GB local disk and Premium Storage capability makes it suitable for small-scale databases, web serving, and development environments that require a combination of dedicated processing power and local storage capacity.
description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadsv7 family, utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. This balanced hardware profile makes the D4ads_v7 well-suited for general-purpose applications, small-scale databases, and web serving workloads that benefit from dedicated compute resources and local storage capacity.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, sixteen gigabytes of memory, and local storage capabilities.
bullet_points: Four dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
Sixteen gigabytes of system memory providing four gigabytes per core
Two hundred thirty-six gigabytes of local disk storage
Premium Storage capability for enhanced disk performance
Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Suitable for general-purpose applications and small-scale databases
